title: KPop Demon Hunters Golden Wins Best Original Song at 2026 Golden Globes
text: The song Golden from KPop Demon Hunters won Best Original Song at the 2026 Golden Globes. The award recognized the song's cultural impact and chart success. Golden topped the Billboard Hot 100 chart and spent multiple weeks in the top 10. The song was performed by EJAE, who voiced the character Rumi in the animated film. Rolling Stone reported on the win, highlighting the unprecedented success of a K-pop song winning a major award category. This dual win for KPop Demon Hunters—Best Motion Picture - Animated and Best Original Song—demonstrates the film's complete dominance at the ceremony.
